[root@localhost ~]# cat/book/grub/grub.conf
# grub.conf generated by anaconda
#
# Note that you do not have to return grub after making changes to this file
# NOTICE: You have a /boot partition. This means that
#       all kernel and initrd paths are relative to /boot/, eg.
#       root (hd0,0)
#       kernel /vmlinuz-version ro root=/dev/sda3
#       initrd/initrd-version.img
#boot=/dev/sda
default=0
timeout=5
splashimage=(hd0.0)/grub/splash.xpm.gz
password --md5 $1$6h8Y01$HIA5xjCDV9VznbBAZw05o1
hiddenmenu
title CentOS (2.6.18-308.el5)
           root (hd0.0)
           kernel /vmlinuz-2.6.18-308.el5 ro root=LABEL=/
           initrd /initrd-2.6.18-308.e15.img
